title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Walmart India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Walmart India in Chandigarh is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Walmart India:
Walmart India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India!
